info.name: Google Data Studio Looker Studio Linking API
Google Data Studio Create a pre-configured Looker Studio report

params.name: c.reportId
params.description: The template report ID. If omitted, a blank report is created.

params.name: c.pageId
params.description: Specifies the initial page to load in the report.

params.name: c.mode
params.description: Sets the initial mode of the report on load. Accepts "view" or "edit".

params.name: c.explain
params.description: Enables the debug/info dialog for troubleshooting. Set to true to display debug information.

params.name: r.reportName
params.description: Overrides the template report name with the specified value.

params.name: r.measurementId
params.description: Sets Google Analytics Measurement IDs for the report.

params.name: r.keepMeasurementId
params.description: When true, preserves the template's measurement IDs instead of replacing them.

params.name: ds.ds0.datasourceName
params.description: Sets the display name of the data source. The alias (e.g., ds0) identifies which data source in the template to configure.

params.name: ds.ds0.connector
params.description: Specifies the connector type for the data source. When set, the data source configuration is completely replaced (all required parameters must be provided). When omitted, only specified parameters are updated while others are inherited from the template. Supported connectors include bigQuery, googleSheets, googleAnalytics, cloudSpanner, looker, searchConsole, googleCloudStorage, and community connectors.

params.name: ds.ds0.refreshFields
params.description: Controls field refresh behavior. Set to true to refresh fields when the data source configuration changes.

params.name: ds.ds0.projectId
params.description: Google Cloud project ID. Used with BigQuery and Cloud Spanner connectors.

params.name: ds.ds0.datasetId
params.description: BigQuery dataset ID. Used with the BigQuery TABLE type.

params.name: ds.ds0.tableId
params.description: BigQuery table ID. Used with the BigQuery TABLE type.

params.name: ds.ds0.type
params.description: BigQuery query type. Accepts TABLE or CUSTOM_QUERY.

params.name: ds.ds0.sql
params.description: SQL query string for BigQuery CUSTOM_QUERY type or Cloud Spanner connector.

params.name: ds.ds0.spreadsheetId
params.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID.

params.name: ds.ds0.worksheetId
params.description: Google Sheets worksheet ID.

params.name: ds.ds0.hasHeader
params.description: Whether the Google Sheet has a header row. Defaults to true.

params.name: ds.ds0.range
params.description: Cell range to use from the Google Sheet (e.g., A1:D100).

params.name: ds.ds0.accountId
params.description: Google Analytics account ID.

params.name: ds.ds0.propertyId
params.description: Google Analytics property ID.

params.name: ds.ds0.viewId
params.description: Google Analytics view ID. Required for Universal Analytics only.

params.name: ds.ds0.instanceId
params.description: Cloud Spanner instance ID.

params.name: ds.ds0.databaseId
params.description: Cloud Spanner database ID.

params.name: ds.ds0.instanceUrl
params.description: Looker instance URL.

params.name: ds.ds0.model
params.description: Looker model name.

params.name: ds.ds0.explore
params.description: Looker explore name.

params.name: ds.ds0.siteUrl
params.description: Google Search Console site URL.

params.name: ds.ds0.tableType
params.description: Search Console table type.

params.name: ds.ds0.searchType
params.description: Search Console search type.

params.name: ds.ds0.pathType
params.description: Google Cloud Storage path type. Accepts FILE or FOLDER.

params.name: ds.ds0.path
params.description: Google Cloud Storage file or folder path.

params.name: ds.ds0.connectorId
params.description: Community connector ID. Used to specify a community-built connector along with any connector-specific parameters.

items.docs: Forwards the user to a pre-configured Looker Studio report using URL parameters. The user is presented with a report based on the specified template and data source configuration. Clicking "Edit and share" saves a personal copy to the user's account with full editing and sharing capabilities. Users need view access to the template report. When data source configuration is updated, users need view access to any reusable data sources. Embedded data sources inherit permissions from the report.

info.name: Google Data Studio Create a pre-configured embedded Looker Studio report

params.name: c.reportId
params.description: The template report ID. If omitted, a blank report is created.

params.name: c.pageId
params.description: Specifies the initial page to load in the report.

params.name: c.mode
params.description: Sets the initial mode of the report on load. Accepts "view" or "edit".

params.name: c.explain
params.description: Enables the debug/info dialog for troubleshooting.

params.name: r.reportName
params.description: Overrides the template report name.

params.name: ds.ds0.connector
params.description: Specifies the connector type for the data source configuration. When set, the data source is completely replaced. When omitted, only specified parameters are updated.

params.name: ds.ds0.datasourceName
params.description: Sets the display name of the data source.

params.name: ds.ds0.refreshFields
params.description: Controls whether fields are refreshed on configuration change.

items.docs: Forwards the user to a pre-configured embedded Looker Studio report using URL parameters. This endpoint provides the same functionality as the standard report creation endpoint but optimized for embedding in iframes. Accepts the same parameters as the /reporting/create endpoint.
